_meta.license: Academic + journalism reference — public revenue and spending data sourced from Department of Education filings.
_meta.attribution: Revenue tiers are paraphrased from Knight-Newhouse public reporting on college athletics finances.
_meta.caveat: Revenue tiers shift annually with TV deals and conference realignment. This snapshot is design reference only.

tiers.narrative: Top-tier media-rights + ticketing + donor pipelines. Cap usage typically saturates the House-v.-NCAA $20.5M annual share within Q3.
Strong basketball + football revenue, healthy donor pipeline. Cap usage approaches but doesn't routinely max out the annual share.
Solid power-conference baseline. Rev-share strategy emphasizes football + basketball; Olympic sports lean on donor support.
Mid-major footprint with regional draw. Rev-share strategy is brand-deal heavy with collective-supplement.
Cap-share is symbolic; brand-deal + collective revenue dominates. Title IX equity ratios are tighter under EADA review.
